subject: The $100M Money Models Winners Are In
body:
Hey Justin,

What a launch.

The $100M Money Models release was one for the books and you helped make it happen.

The final results are in.

Check out the leaderboard to see the Top 50 Affiliates: leaderboard.acq.com

If you're in the Top 50, you've secured your spot at the on-site Affiliate Workshop Day on Tuesday, October 21st. Congrats!

Your separate registration email will arrive on Tuesday, August 19th.

For the 50 Affiliate Giveaway winners, your registration link will also be sent on August 19th.

And for everyone who referred 10 or more clients, thank you. You'll receive your copy of the 70 One-Minute Business Tactics audiobook on August 19th.

This community went all in and the results speak for themselves. We couldn't be more excited for what's ahead.

Alex
